de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions

Class SupportedTaclets.TreeItem

  • java.lang.Object
    • javax.swing.tree.DefaultMutableTreeNode
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions.SupportedTaclets.TreeItem
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Cloneable, MutableTreeNode, TreeNode
    Enclosing class:
    SupportedTaclets

    public static class SupportedTaclets.TreeItem
extends DefaultMutableTreeNode
    TreeItem represents the user data in a tree model.
